offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed payment deadlines cause supplier penalties. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of payment due dates.
problem: Missed payment deadlines leading to late orders and supplier penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Participate in forums where Etsy sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try due date reminders via email and dashboard.
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
